title: クール・アンド・ヒート

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Vodka and Daiwa Scarlet have an
interview for a magazine feature on "Rivals."
Everything is going smoothly...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
...And that's a wrap! We've got everything we
need! Great job, both of you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka and Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Thanks!
Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Whew... Finally, we're finished.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Having to spend the whole time with you was
awwwful.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what are you looking at me like that for? If
you have something to say, go ahead and say it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Your signature racewear is so frilly.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? Why are you bringing that up now?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've had the chance to really look at it, I
realized how crazy it is. I'm surprised you can run
with all that flappin' around.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Are you making fun of me?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Not at all. It's just not my style is all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...That reminds me. There's something I've been
wanting to ask you for a while.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can never decide whether your racewear looks
hot to run in or cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! So you noticed!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I made sure it had everything, so it'd be awesome
to the max!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Like, belts are cool, so I've got a bunch of 'em!
And even though they're leather, they're light and
super easy to run in!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The balance between hot and cool is what makes
it so great! It shows my dual nature... You know?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's why I run so well... I couldn't stop myself if I
tried... Heh.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...You mean you can't stop being so dumb, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying you don't believe in the mastery
of hot and cool in my signature racewear?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I guess I'll have to make ya understand!
choice_data_list: Show her how well you run!
A match might be the fastest way to settle this...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's perfect! Seeing is believing, after all!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Watch this, Scarlet! I'm gonna show you some
masterful running you'll never forget!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm really not interested.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, having my clothes power me up is totally
cool! I'm like a superhero!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, I bet I'm gonna shave some seconds off
my time today. Make sure ya time me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're not even listening to me... You really are a
total dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Humoring a very pumped-up Vodka, I time her
run...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... How'd I do, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Amazing! You beat your best time!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You're kidding, right?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. You see that, Scarlet? I got my best time
ever!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whooo! ♪ That felt good! I'm just gonna keep
goin'!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You just willed yourself into beating your record?
Dummies like you really are scary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We watch Vodka run around joyously, Daiwa
Scarlet muttering under her breath with what
might be a tinge of jealousy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What? A match?! Could you not involve me in
this, please?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, I see. And since Scarlet's wearing her
signature racewear too, we can really compare
ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I've got just the thing! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right. Let's start with free weights! After that,
we'll face off with equipment!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...I hate this, but I guess I have to ask. Why are we
in the gym?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. This is a match between the two of us
to see who has really mastered their dual natures.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Me with the hot and cool style, or you with the
frilly and forceful style?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's see who's managed to bring out both of
their sides better!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You dummy! You really think of the stupidest
things!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Vodka keeps pushing and the battle
begins...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All riiight! I win again!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ughhh!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. What's the matter, Scarlet? I'm wiping the
floor with you today!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: B-but this is...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what do you think those two are doing in
their signature racewear?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Who knows... Practicing for something, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can concentrate with all these
people around!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Um, Scarlet? What are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, nothing much! There's nothing to see here,
everyone. Just forget you saw anything.☆

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But as for you two... you better believe I'm going to remember this.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Did you see that face? So scary...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I forgot that when it comes to having dual
natures, Scarlet is always number one...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Vodka won the battle, but lost the war...
